system.descriptor: Dodge is the ability to evade blows, shots, and other attacks through quick reflexes and spatial awareness.
system.uses:
Uses: Evading melee and ranged attacks, avoiding area effects, diving for cover.
Dodge is a Reaction and can be used once per Round without penalty. Additional Dodge attempts in the same Round suffer a cumulative -20 penalty. A successful Dodge negates one hit; extra Degrees of Success negate additional hits from the same attack.

description.value: Dodge is the ability to evade blows, shots, and other attacks through quick reflexes and spatial awareness.
